n.description: Simple random sample size drawn from the population, used as the number of trials in the binomial formula.

p.description: Prevalence of asthma in the population, used as the probability of success in the binomial formula. Also used to derive q = 1 − p = 0.96.

x.description: The specific number of asthmatics whose probability of being observed is being calculated (Pr(X=1)).
